race.comment: OUR GIRL SCARLETT (9) opened this campaign with a couple of nice efforts then failed to run on as anticipated over this trip at Ipswich last start. Best figures stack up favourably so she gets her chance to put the record straight. LISTING CAPITAL (11) led but succumbed late and missed the placings over 1200m at Murwillumbah last start. Should give some cheek around this tight circuit back to 1100m. MISHANI PRINCE (4) resumes. Placed a couple of times in town last prep which is good form for a race of this quality. Market watch on ALL BANGED UP (1) on debut from the Lindsay Gough stable. Two trials have been okay but expect there is more under the hood. Another first starter in AFRICAN EVENING (5) deserves attention. By Harry Angel from a Cape Cross mare who has prodeced seven multiple winners from seven foals to race. Sure to have ability.
